notes: subagent-orphan-cleanup for mistral-vibe (1-child variant; the no-working-transition invariant is identical for any N≥1). The parent uses the builtin Task tool to spawn ONE synchronous explore subagent that reads a seeded README.md three times and waits 30s; while the child is in flight the recipe SIGKILLs the vibe process group, orphaning the child. Spec asserts the CORRECT arc (not weakened to the bug): parent ready→working at spawn, the child transcript materializes under <parent>/agents/<child>/messages.jsonl and is minted as a session (task.py save_dir=session_dir/'agents'; FilesUnderRoot recurses), the child is parent_linked (child meta.json carries parent_session_id=parent.session_id), then on SIGKILL the pid_manager sweep emits process_exited for BOTH parent and child (both resolve to the one vibe PID via cwd+cmdline discovery) with NO spurious working/waiting transition for the orphaned child (issue #321), final state ready. KNOWN FAILING (daemon=bug): the vibe adapter drops the link — parser.go sets no ParentSessionID, sidecar.go reads the child meta.json but ignores its parent_session_id, and deriveParentSession has no vibe .../agents/<child>/ rule — so parent_linked does NOT fire (the child surfaces UNLINKED). Unlike gemini-cli 3-4, the child IS observed (transcript_new fires; FilesUnderRoot recurses) and the SIGKILL reap works — ONLY parent_linked is known_failing; parent_killed/child_cleanup are anchored on parent_turn_start (a landed phase) so the one failing phase does not cascade. Single-birth adapter (session id = the transcript directory, sessionIDFromPath), birth anchored to start unpinned. DRIVER GAP: sigkill routed to not_implemented; record ports it. Observations: model mistral-medium-3.5 (live config.active_model), tokens_nonzero (sidecar stats.context_tokens → turn_done), cost_nonzero=false (parser never reads stats.session_cost; mistral-vibe absent from core/pkg/capacity).

text: Parent session_<...> born in ready when its transcript directory appears (single-birth; id from the transcript directory)
User Task-tool prompt drives the parent ready → working
Subagent transcript materializes under <parent>/agents/<explore_...>/messages.jsonl — fswatcher recurses and mints a SessionState for the child (currently minted UNLINKED)

KNOWN FAILING: detector should bind child.session_id → parent.session_id (child meta.json parent_session_id = parent.session_id), but parser.go/sidecar.go drop the link and deriveParentSession has no vibe rule → no parent_linked (spec asserts the correct behavior)
SIGKILL on the vibe process group: pid_manager emits process_exited for the parent session

invariants: no state_transition to working for child after parent_killed
no state_transition to waiting for child after parent_killed
text: The orphaned child (a session on the now-dead shared vibe PID) is reaped without a spurious working/waiting transition (issue #321 invariant)
